name: unified-tab-05-diff-integration
title: Phase 5/6: Diff 视图集成为 Tab
description: 将三种 diff 打开方式（本地项目/worktree/WSL）统一为创建 diff tab。移除 MainContent 中的 worktreeDiffState/wslDiffState/diffFilePath 状态和互斥条件链。DiffView 从覆盖渲染变为 tab 内容渲染，通过 activeTab.kind === 'diff' 判断。
creator: tincopper
notes:
产出：(1) openDiffTab 便捷方法; (2) 三种 diff 流程改为 store.openDiffTab; (3) MainContent 移除 worktreeDiffState/wslDiffState/diffFilePath; (4) DiffView 通过 activeTab.kind==='diff' 渲染; (5) 后端 set_view_diff/active_view 可选废弃

迁移要点：(1) 本地 diff: handleSelectFile → openDiffTab({type:'local', projectId}, filePath); (2) worktree diff: handleSelectWorktreeFile → openDiffTab({type:'worktree',...}, filePath); (3) WSL diff: handleSelectWslFile → openDiffTab({type:'wsl',...}, filePath); (4) DiffView onBack → closeTab; (5) DiffView 接收 Tab.data (DiffTabData) 而非独立 props

meta.backend_optional: set_view_diff 命令和 active_view 字段可废弃（需确认无其他依赖）
